mapper.select: SELECT r.reservation_id, r.user_id, r.book_id, r.reservation_status, r.reserved_at, r.expires_at, r.completed_at, r.cancelled_at, r.created_at, r.updated_at, u.name AS user_name, b.title AS book_title FROM reservations r INNER JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id INNER JOIN book b ON r.book_id = b.book_id WHERE r.reservation_id = #{reservationId}

SELECT r.reservation_id, r.user_id, r.book_id, r.reservation_status, r.reserved_at, r.expires_at, r.completed_at, r.cancelled_at, r.created_at, r.updated_at, u.name AS user_name, b.title AS book_title FROM reservations r INNER JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id INNER JOIN book b ON r.book_id = b.book_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN r.reservation_status = 'ACTIVE' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, r.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE reservations SET reservation_status = 'CANCELLED', cancelled_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId}
UPDATE reservations SET reservation_status = 'COMPLETED', completed_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId}
mapper.select: SELECT r.reservation_id, r.user_id, r.book_id, r.reservation_status, r.reserved_at, r.expires_at, r.completed_at, r.cancelled_at, r.created_at, r.updated_at, u.name AS user_name, b.title AS book_title FROM reservations r INNER JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id INNER JOIN book b ON r.book_id = b.book_id WHERE r.book_id = #{bookId} AND r.reservation_status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY r.reserved_at ASC

SELECT r.reservation_id, r.user_id, r.book_id, r.reservation_status, r.reserved_at, r.expires_at, r.completed_at, r.cancelled_at, r.created_at, r.updated_at, u.name AS user_name, b.title AS book_title FROM reservations r INNER JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id INNER JOIN book b ON r.book_id = b.book_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.book_id = #{bookId} AND reservation_status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY r.reserved_at ASC

SELECT reservation_id, user_id, book_id, reservation_status, reserved_at, expires_at, completed_at, cancelled_at, created_at, updated_at FROM reservations WHERE reservation_status = 'ACTIVE' AND expires_at IS NOT NULL AND expires_at < NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE reservations SET reservation_status = 'EXPIRED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId}
UPDATE reservations SET expires_at = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY), updated_at = NOW() WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId}
mapper.select: SELECT r.reservation_id, r.user_id, r.book_id, r.reservation_status, r.reserved_at, r.expires_at, r.completed_at, r.cancelled_at, r.created_at, r.updated_at, u.name AS user_name, b.title AS book_title FROM reservations r INNER JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id INNER JOIN book b ON r.book_id = b.book_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.reservation_status = 'ACTIVE' AND r.expires_at IS NOT NULL AND r.expires_at > NOW() ORDER BY r.reserved_at ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservations WHERE book_id = #{bookId} AND reservation_status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT r.reservation_id, r.user_id, r.book_id, r.reservation_status, r.reserved_at, r.expires_at, r.completed_at, r.cancelled_at, r.created_at, r.updated_at, u.name AS user_name, b.title AS book_title FROM reservations r INNER JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id INNER JOIN book b ON r.book_id = b.book_id ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.reservation_id, r.user_id, r.book_id, r.reservation_status, r.reserved_at, r.expires_at, r.completed_at, r.cancelled_at, r.created_at, r.updated_at, u.name AS user_name, b.title AS book_title FROM reservations r INNER JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id INNER JOIN book b ON r.book_id = b.book_id WHERE r.reservation_status = #{status} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.reservation_id, r.user_id, r.book_id, r.reservation_status, r.reserved_at, r.expires_at, r.completed_at, r.cancelled_at, r.created_at, r.updated_at, u.name AS user_name, b.title AS book_title FROM reservations r INNER JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id INNER JOIN book b ON r.book_id = b.book_id WHERE u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
